category_sources: source_facts.description says Wayland is a protocol for a compositor to talk to its clients.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Wayland site.
display_name_sources: Official homepage is the Wayland site and uses the Wayland project name.
docs_sources: Official Wayland site hosts generated API documentation under /docs/html/.
source_facts.repo points to the official GitLab repository whose README provides source-adjacent documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/wayland/wayland, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the compositor/client protocol role.
source_facts.executables lists wayland-scanner, a Wayland protocol development tool.
